'''Quosits''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of twenty-five centimeter [[Insect/Legends|insects]] native to [[Rhommamool/Legends|Rhommamool]]. The [[Gender/Legends|hermaphroditic]] beings inhabited the underground.

{{Creature-stub}}
